title: Orthodox Wood Totem Cross
description: Replaces totem with a Orthodox wood cross
body:
Check out the Orthodox Wood Totem Cross Resource Pack for Minecraft! It swaps the old Totem of Undying for a fresh Orthodox Wood Cross, enhancing your adventure. Get the pack now for a whole new Minecraft journey!

![Cross](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/675e4e1cce8f41d47c2fedb8e887930a9ff7a1c7.png)
